title: Brave New World
description: A reimagined fantasy world for adventure and exploration!
body:
## About

_Experience an unforgettable adventure with this reimagining of Minecraft! Immerse yourself in a world full of excitement, with many adventure mods, challenging bosses and a lot of exciting game content. Embark on epic quests, fight formidable opponents and explore new spaces._

 _Unleash the power of enchantment, find hidden treasures and find a long-awaited rest in these wilds._

  _Dive into a vast realm filled with depths of mystery, danger, and endless possibilities. Are you ready for this journey? Adventure awaits!_

##  Some features
![Clock, globe, barometer and etc.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06d6caeae42a7c6815064e019f0ce461804f25d0.png)
- **No coordinates ( You can find out coordinates through items from mods )**
- **Long Daytime ( 2.5x longer )**
- **Increased difficulty to reach "The End" phase**

  
##   Modifications

![Hamster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ea60f5d2114e359660611f332c6121a890b3ea1.png)

_**Over than 165 mods for a comfortable game!**_

###   Main mods:
- [Archers](https://modrinth.com/mod/archers)
- [Another Furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/another-furniture)
- [Dungeons and Taverns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns)
- [Fabric Seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-seasons)
- [Farmer`s Delight (+ Addons)](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric)
- [Galosphere](https://modrinth.com/mod/galosphere)
- [Jewelry](https://modrinth.com/mod/jewelry)
- [Let's Do: Meadow](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-meadow)
- [MineCells](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecells)
- [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries)
- [Vinery (+ Addons)](https://modrinth.com/mod/vinery)


</details>



## Multiplayer 
![Coins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3e46ce810eb312a84b5c2529ec349fe3c2cece7.png)
The modpack is suitable for multiplayer, because it has:

[Coins JE](https://modrinth.com/mod/coins-je) - A simple coins mod for questing and roleplay.

[Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure) - Camera mod with focus on process and aesthetics, share your moments of joy with friends. 

## 
Wiki: _later_
## 


_**"The brave may not live forever, but the cautious do not live at all."**_
